title: IBM's Quarterly Performance Misses Expectations, Stock Plummets; Executives Insist AI Won't Eliminate Mainframes
excerpt: IBM recently released its latest quarterly report, achieving $17.2 billion in quarterly revenue and $2.2 billion in net profit, but the overall performance stil
content_html:
IBM recently released its latest quarterly report, achieving $17.2 billion in quarterly revenue and $2.2 billion in net profit, but the overall performance still fell far short of Wall Street's expectations. Due to a severe decline in the infrastructure business, the company's stock price even plummeted by a record 25% in a single day, forcing executives to lower the full-year growth outlook.

Surging Costs Squeeze Customer Budgets

The main reason for the declining performance was a significant hit to the company's core mainframe business, which saw a 42% drop compared to the same period last year. This decline triggered a chain reaction, as reduced hardware sales directly affected the revenue from high-profit software.

CEO Krishna explained that with the rise of the artificial intelligence boom, data center and computer component costs increased by 15% to 30%, forcing many enterprise customers to delay mainframe purchases. However, the management emphasized that this is just a temporary adjustment, and customers have not abandoned mainframes, with plans to resume purchasing in the future.

Due to a severe decline in the infrastructure business, the company's stock price even plummeted by a record 25% in a single day, forcing executives to lower the full-year growth outlook.

sentences.en: IBM recently released its latest quarterly report, achieving $17.2 billion in quarterly revenue and $2.2 billion in net profit, but the overall performance still fell far short of Wall Street's expectations.
sentences.zh: IBM近日发布最新季报，实现季度营收172亿美元，净利润22亿美元，但整体业绩仍远低于华尔街预期。

sentences.en: Due to a severe decline in the infrastructure business, the company's stock price even plummeted by a record 25% in a single day, forcing executives to lower the full-year growth outlook.
sentences.zh: 由于基建业务严重下滑，该公司股价甚至单日暴跌创纪录的25%，迫使高管下调全年增长预期。
成本飙升挤压客户预算

blocks.html_en: The main reason for the declining performance was a significant hit to the company's core mainframe business, which saw a 42% drop compared to the same period last year. This decline triggered a chain reaction, as reduced hardware sales directly affected the revenue from high-profit software.

sentences.en: The main reason for the declining performance was a significant hit to the company's core mainframe business, which saw a 42% drop compared to the same period last year.
sentences.zh: 业绩下滑的主要原因是公司核心主机业务受到重大打击，同比下降42%。

sentences.en: This decline triggered a chain reaction, as reduced hardware sales directly affected the revenue from high-profit software.
sentences.zh: 这种下降引发了连锁反应，因为硬件销量的减少直接影响了高利润软件的收入。

blocks.html_en: CEO Krishna explained that with the rise of the artificial intelligence boom, data center and computer component costs increased by 15% to 30%, forcing many enterprise customers to delay mainframe purchases. However, the management emphasized that this is just a temporary adjustment, and customers have not abandoned mainframes, with plans to resume purchasing in the future.

sentences.en: CEO Krishna explained that with the rise of the artificial intelligence boom, data center and computer component costs increased by 15% to 30%, forcing many enterprise customers to delay mainframe purchases.
sentences.zh: CEO Krishna 解释称，随着人工智能热潮的兴起，数据中心和计算机组件成本增加了 15% 至 30%，迫使许多企业客户推迟大型机采购。

sentences.en: However, the management emphasized that this is just a temporary adjustment, and customers have not abandoned mainframes, with plans to resume purchasing in the future.
sentences.zh: 不过，管理层强调，这只是临时调整，客户并未放弃大型机，未来计划恢复采购。

content_html_zh:
IBM近日发布最新季报，实现季度营收172亿美元，净利润22亿美元，但整体业绩仍远低于华尔街预期。 由于基建业务严重下滑，该公司股价甚至单日暴跌创纪录的25%，迫使高管下调全年增长预期。

成本飙升挤压客户预算

业绩下滑的主要原因是公司核心主机业务受到重大打击，同比下降42%。 这种下降引发了连锁反应，因为硬件销量的减少直接影响了高利润软件的收入。

CEO Krishna 解释称，随着人工智能热潮的兴起，数据中心和计算机组件成本增加了 15% 至 30%，迫使许多企业客户推迟大型机采购。 不过，管理层强调，这只是临时调整，客户并未放弃大型机，未来计划恢复采购。
